message:
fix(web): prevent SequenceView scroll reset on desktop

The scroll position sync effect was firing when scrollPosition changed,
but at that moment storeScrollPosition was still stale. This caused the
effect to reset scroll to the old store value.

Fix: Remove scrollPosition from the effect's dependency array. The effect
should only respond to storeScrollPosition changes from external sources
(gene map clicks, collaboration sync) - not from user scrolling.
